headline: D.R. Horton's Q3 Earnings Beat on Higher Closings, Stock Up
summary: DHI tops fiscal Q3 estimates as higher closings offset margin pressure, though cautious demand and elevated incentives prompt a guidance cut.

raw.headline: D.R. Horton's Q3 Earnings Beat on Higher Closings, Stock Up
raw.summary: DHI tops fiscal Q3 estimates as higher closings offset margin pressure, though cautious demand and elevated incentives prompt a guidance cut.

headline: America's Largest Homebuilder Says Buyers Are Still Hesitating
summary: D.R. Horton beats Q3 earnings with $3.20 EPS, but lowers FY26 revenue outlook due to home market pressures. Get the key financial details.
